summary: Completed testing role simplification from 3 roles to 2 roles (superadmin and user/worker). Backend role validation working correctly, but frontend has critical issues with worker functionality and deprecated role labels.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 405 Method Not Allowed instead of 404 for POST requests
minor_bugs.impact: Should return 404 since admin creation was removed

ui_bugs.issue: Dashboard page completely blank/empty - no content loaded
Clock In button not clickable - element not stable/enabled

integration_issues.issue: Worker dashboard fails to load any content - likely data fetching issue

role_display_issues.issue: Still shows deprecated 'Admin' role labels instead of 'Super Admin'/'Worker'

passed_tests: Sidebar shows 'Super Admin' badge for superadmin role
Sidebar shows 'Worker' badge for user role
Admin dashboard loads with stats and charts
Admin Users page loads without 'Create Admin' button
Backend API returns only superadmin and user roles

critical_fixes: Fix WorkerDashboard component - page is completely blank/empty
Fix clock in/out button functionality - not clickable due to stability/enabled issues
Update role label display in AdminUsersPage - remove deprecated 'Admin' labels, show only 'Super Admin'/'Worker'
minor_fixes: Remove or fix /api/users/admin endpoint to return 404 instead of 405
